initiatives.name: Pine Pantry
initiatives.description: A mutual aid initiative providing free food and essential items to the Oklahoma City community through accessible pantry locations. They coordinate food distribution, community donations, and resource sharing while building sustainable networks of community care and solidarity.

initiatives.name: RestoreOKC
initiatives.description: A community development organization focused on restoration of health, education, residences, and employment alongside neighbors in Northeast OKC. They coordinate mutual aid and community-driven redevelopment through relationship-based initiatives, including a community-owned grocery store, urban farm, affordable housing programs, and job training initiatives to build sustainable community power.

initiatives.name: OKC Youth Aid Brigade
initiatives.description: A youth-led mutual aid collective in Oklahoma City focused on community support and solidarity. They organize direct assistance, resource sharing, and youth empowerment initiatives while building community power through collective action.

initiatives.name: Bagz of Luv
initiatives.description: A mutual aid initiative providing essential supplies and care packages to unhoused and vulnerable community members in Oklahoma City. They coordinate direct aid distribution, resource sharing, and community support while building networks of solidarity and mutual care.

initiatives.name: OKC DSA
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community solidarity through democratic socialist organizing in Oklahoma City. They coordinate direct support, resource sharing, and solidarity networks while building power through collective organizing and community care.

initiatives.name: Shred the Stigma OK
initiatives.description: Free harm reduction supplies delivered anonymously in OKC.

initiatives.name: Serve the People OK
initiatives.description: StpOK believes love and compassion are important revolutionary tools.
